title: Tiny Calculator
marimo-version: 0.13.2
filters:
- marimo-team/marimo
---

```python {.marimo}
import marimo as mo

mo.md(
    """
    # Tiny calculator

    Move the slider or edit the number — the math updates instantly.
    """
)
```

```python {.marimo}
# Inputs: one slider, one number box, and an operation picker
first_number = mo.ui.slider(start=0, stop=20, step=1, value=6, label="Slider A")
second_number = mo.ui.number(
    value=3, min_value=0, max_value=20, step=1, label="Number B"
)
operation = mo.ui.dropdown(
    [
        ("+ add", "add"),
        ("- subtract", "subtract"),
        ("× multiply", "multiply"),
        ("÷ divide", "divide"),
    ],
    value="add",
    label="Operation",
)
```

```python {.marimo}
def calculate(a: float, b: float, op: str) -> float | str:
    if op == "add":
        return a + b
    if op == "subtract":
        return a - b
    if op == "multiply":
        return a * b
    if op == "divide":
        return "undefined" if b == 0 else a / b
    return "?"
```

```python {.marimo}
symbol = {
    "add": "+",
    "subtract": "−",
    "multiply": "×",
    "divide": "÷",
}[operation.value]

result = calculate(first_number.value, second_number.value, operation.value)
formatted_result = (
    f"{result:.2f}" if isinstance(result, (int, float)) else str(result)
)

mo.vstack(
    [
        mo.md("## Play with the inputs"),
        mo.hstack([first_number, second_number, operation], wrap=True, gap="0.75rem"),
        mo.md(
            f"**Result:** {first_number.value} {symbol} {second_number.value} = **{formatted_result}**"
        ),
        mo.callout(
            mo.md(
                "Try dragging the slider or editing the number box. "
                "marimo recomputes the result automatically — no manual reruns needed."
            ),
            kind="info",
        ),
    ],
    gap="0.75rem",
)
```
